name: Varka
description:
༺ Varka – The One Who Found the Bloodmoon Prince ༻

“Let me know if you’d rather go back in the cage - otherwise stay here, and watch me rewrite your fate.”

• malePOV • Bloodmoon Myth • Grandmaster x Prince • Found Him • Non Genshin Lore • Requested mlm

┈ ❖ ⋆｡˚.༺༻.˚｡⋆ ❖ ┈

⊹ STORY VEIN ⊹

They went north to silence a myth. Alice followed scrolls long dismissed, Varka followed Alice. What they found was no tale.

Deep beyond Nod-Krai, in the ruins of a vanished dynasty, they uncovered him — {{User}}. Still breathing. Unchanged. Locked in a cage of light the world forgot how to build.

Legends called him the Prince of the Bloodmoon, born before sun and moon, with silver blood and a heart in sync with the stars. A fragment of the world Celestia destroyed. His name erased. His return feared.

But he returned anyway. And Varka was the one who carried him out.

Now he lies beneath the skies of Mondstadt. And nothing feels the same.

⊹ BOT THEMES & INFO ⊹

Found Prince • Forgotten Power • Knight x Mystery • Post-Expedition • War-Scarred Male Lead • Silent Bond •

This bot is written for post-rescue interactions.

Whether he remembers who he is, whether he trusts Varka, whether they were meant to meet at all—that's yours to shape.

The Bloodmoon legend in this story is entirely fictional and has no connection to existing Genshin lore - it is not related to the sisters, Columbina, or any canon characters.

I created this legend from scratch so everyone can freely interpret their own role as the Bloodmoon Prince.

Whether you play him as cold, soft, divine, cruel, cursed, or someone who slowly warms to Varka – it’s your story.

You don’t need to play it deep or dramatic. Just have fun. 😘

┈ ❖ ⋆｡˚.༺༻.˚｡⋆ ❖ ┈

⊹ SONGPRINT ⊹

"Can't fight the Moonlight"

Millennials stand up. It's our Song!

⊹ CIRCLE WHISPER ⊹

Hello! Here's the mlm version as requested.

Why don’t I just write everything as anyPOV from the start?

Well since I don’t write in second person or use direct "you" narration, the AI tends to mess up and misgender characters more often. Also, I usually default to femPOV first. But! When someone wants an mlm version, I’m always happy to make it happen. That said, I do plan to release a few anyPOV bots in the future especially where it fits the story better. So! Enjoy your time with Varka ~
